title: InventoryTracker
description: Save your players inventory and track items quickly and easily - InvLog
body:
# ABOUT
InventoryTracker is a plugin made for autosaving inventories at specific times. With multiple features that help the player track and restore other inventories.

### PERFORMANT - EASY TO USE - MYSQL SUPPORT

# FEATURES
- **InvLog Filter:** Added the ability to filter the type of log you want to view based on your needs.
- **Death Info:** There are statistics on the information of the playerìs death, such as who caused the player death and the weapon used, and a lot more...
- **EnderChests Rollback:** The inventory isn't the only thing InventoryTracker can rollback, but it will rollback the enderchest too...
- **Export as Shulker Box:** With inventory tracker you can export the rollback as Shulker Boxes to give to your server players.
- **Easy to use:** Everything is managed via GUI making it easy and fast to use.

![Presentation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/903b50c9d09b31e1a8e2af474440793e1b55496b.jpeg)
![Wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e24d44e174fb17f0c9b527dfc1496b3c223f0831.jpeg)![Description](https://i.imgur.com/GtQHEza.jpeg)![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a33461f5c3d4440a54389fd519fb7f3acd530518.jpeg)
